    <p>Preparation of Standard stock Solution:</p><p>Step-1: Weighed and transferred {fb_input_1} (10mg) of NDBA, {fb_input_2} (10mg) of NDPA, {fb_input_3} (10mg) of NEIPA and {fb_input_4} (10mg) of NDIPA standard into a individual {fb_input_5} (10mL) volumetric flask containing {fb_input_6} (5mL) of methanol and vortex to dissolve and diluted up to the mark with methanol and mixed well.</p><p>Step-2: Transferred {fb_input_7}, {fb_input_8}, {fb_input_9}, {fb_input_10} of Step-1 standard stock solution into a {fb_input_11} volumetric flask containing {fb_input_12} of diluent and vortex to dissolve. Dilute to mark and mix well.</p><p>Step-3: Transferred {fb_input_13} of (Step-2) standard stock solution into {fb_input_14} volumetric flask containing {fb_input_15} of diluent and vortex for {fb_input_16} minutes. Dilute to mark and mix well.</p><p>Preparation of Standard Solution: Transferred {fb_input_17} of above (Step-3) Standard Stock Solution into a {fb_input_18} volumetric flask containing {fb_input_19} of diluent and vortex for {fb_input_20} minutes. Diluted to volume up to the mark with diluent and mixed well.</p><p>Preparation of Intermediate precision standard stock solution:</p><p>Transferred {fb_input_21} (1 mL) of standard stock solution (step-3) into {fb_input_22} (10 mL) volumetric flask containing {fb_input_23} (5 mL) of diluent and mixed well. Diluted to volume up to the mark with diluent and mixed well.</p>

    <p>Three initial spiked preparations (then additional 4-6 to reach 6 per method + intermediate):</p><p><strong>Spiked Preparation-1:</strong></p><p>Weighed and transferred {fb_input_1} (600 mg) of test sample into a {fb_input_2} (5 mL) volumetric flask and added {fb_input_3} (3 mL) of Intermediate precision standard stock solution and vortex to dissolve. Centrifuge for {fb_input_4} (5) minutes at {fb_input_5} (7000) Rpm at {fb_input_6} (25) °C. Filtered the solution through {fb_input_7} (0.22) µm PVDF filter and discard first {fb_input_8} (1) mL solution.</p><p><strong>Spiked Preparation-2:</strong></p><p>Weighed and transferred {fb_input_9} (600 mg) of test sample into a {fb_input_10} (5 mL) volumetric flask and added {fb_input_11} (3 mL) of Intermediate precision standard stock solution and vortex to dissolve. Centrifuge for {fb_input_12} (5) minutes at {fb_input_13} (7000) Rpm at {fb_input_14} (25) °C.
